chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1893 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.7297/2023 (Ex./A) 2. For orders on CMA No.7298/2023 (C/A) 24.01.2024 Mr. Shahid Hussain Gopang, Advocate for petitioner/applicant. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate has filed power and para wise comments on behalf of alleged contemnors, out of whom alleged contemnor No.3 is present. Listed applications are disposed of in the light of para wise comments, as compliance of the order dated 26.09.2019 has materially been made in the terms that case of the petitioner falls within ‘Category (d)’ that a child of deceased retired employee, in which still no vacancy is available. However, as soon as any vacancy is available, due notice of which would be published, and in case petitioner applies in that category, he would be considered in accordance with law. Listed applications are disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
